title: BetterEnd Crashed Ships Tweaks
description: Adds loot to BE's crashed ships
body:
BetterEnd dynamically generates crashed ships around the end, but despite generating brewing stands with potions and a dragon head, the chests generate completely empty! 

Apparently, there are no plans by BetterEnd to change this, so I decided to release this patch (for a modpack, but anyone can use it). The mod is currently just a simple mixin which automatically adds loot to every newly generated crashed ship. It should also work with any datapacks that modify the ship nbt, such as IchPhilip's Better End Cities. 

**THIS WILL NOT ADD LOOT TO SHIPS THAT HAVE ALREADY BEEN GENERATED**

Planned - Configurable values for:
- Spawn rate of crashed ships
- Chance to enable spawned hostile entities in the ships
- Discard chance for chests/elytra
